approach: one spec at a time; the retired corpus is reference only, nothing is migrated or copied
a legacy case is a claim to verify against the current implementation, never evidence of current behavior
additive scenarios only on the frozen suite; any narrowing would stop the mission
self-assert the spec gate within leash, bring the impl gate to the owner
blast: low — one node's suite plus one stating line in the skill it specs; no engine, no shared instrument, no other suite touched
reversibility: high — additive scenarios on an unmerged branch, revertable without touching any pre-existing contract
novelty: low — the node, its squad and its suite all already exist; this widens a contract rather than introducing a capability
confidence: high — four cold judge rounds, final verdict aligned with no open markers

why: Built the live suite up using the retired corpus as reference only — nothing migrated. Of fourteen candidate legacy cases, seven were rejected before authoring: three STALE (two assert a description prefix a later change request reversed corpus-wide, one requires naming a skill since deleted whose successor the live suite already names — each would now penalize a correct agent), four UNSUPPORTED (the implementation has no such rule, so a scenario would spec aspiration as behavior). Seven scenarios added, structurally additive by gherkin-cli (added seven, zero modified, zero removed) so the freeze is preserved and no re-open was entered. Four cold spec-judge rounds: round one dropped a scenario whose derivation had a branch point the implementation never took, round two split a double-barreled scenario and corrected an over-claim, round three added an atomicity companion after a naive string heuristic was shown to pass the original alone and relocated an assertion that a correct check-then-fix implementation would have failed, round four corrected two spec defects — prose that contradicted its own frozen scenario, and transient change-request narration that had severed the use-case table. Final verdict ALIGNED with no open markers and no blocking defect. Root project status and its human ratification left untouched: additive scenarios self-clear as a detail-adjustment.
